title: Short title
doc_html:
PART II.  CLINICAL LABORATORY PERSONNEL

§1311.  Short title

This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Clinical Laboratory Personnel Law".

Acts 1993, No. 396, §2, eff. Aug. 1, 1993.

§1311.  Short title
